name: Shimazu Shave Ice
tagline: Old-school Kalihi corner shop — shave ice the way your tutu remembers it.
mustOrder: rainbow with ice cream on the bottom
parking: Street parking on Kalihi St — not hard to find a spot
talkStory: Shimazu has been around for decades in Kalihi, a neighborhood tourists never see. The shave ice is classic-style with fine ice and local-brand syrups. The aunties who work here know every kid in the neighborhood by name. It's cash-friendly and no-frills — just a counter window and a bench outside. This is the kind of place that makes Kalihi feel like old Hawaii.
